creator: hashiz@meridiani.jp
text:
incoming packet on ng_l2tp interface bypass PF firewall rules.
        not nat, no filter.

Fix: 

unknown.
	lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-net/2012-January/031161.html
	is not effective on FreeBSD 10
How-To-Repeat: 	setup l2tp/ipsec LNS on FreeBSD and connect from client(such as android).
	a packet from client can not filtering or natting.
